name: MSHTA Suspicious Execution with Polyglot/Script Indicators
description: Suspicious execution of mshta.exe with command line arguments containing 'vbscript' or seemingly benign file extensions, highly indicative of malicious polyglot files or obfuscated script execution.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the mshta.exe process creation.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the mshta.exe executable.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The full command line arguments of mshta.exe, including suspicious keywords or file extensions.

parameters.name: ParentImage
parameters.description: The full path to the parent process that launched mshta.exe.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which mshta.exe was executed.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the mshta.exe process was created.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
